name: com.civic/mcp-gateway
description: Identity, authorization, audit trails, and revocable permissions for AI agents accessing MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: CIVIC_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token generated at app.civic.com during onboarding

environmentVariables.name: CIVIC_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional toolkit profile slug — appended as ?profile=value to scope the gateway to a specific configuration
